dc_description: A shaded dirt and gravel path runs through dense woodland, with sunlight filtering through trees and casting shadows on the ground. On the right, a metal signpost displays a large arrow sign reading "Via Francigena sentiero alternativo" pointing left, with a small pilgrim-style icon. A touring bicycle with bags is leaned against vegetation near the edge of the path, beside a smaller warning/property sign.
novel_visual_observations: The route marker indicates an alternate Via Francigena trail and points toward the left side of the image. The path appears narrow and slightly uphill, bordered closely by thick foliage and earthen banks.
location_name: Vicolo Formellese, Municipio Roma XV, Roma
rich_context: Vicolo Formellese, Municipio Roma XV, Roma, Roma Capitale, Lazio, Italia
